phase_1_change.diff_summary: Removed FIXME comment block (lines 199-210) and empty observe branch body (lines 211-214). Replaced with the 3-line gate: if step.requiredObservation is set and state.observations does not include it, return { state, ok: false, message: step.hint || `Observe: ${step.requiredObservation}` }. Net -4 lines. Surrounding code (forage/craft branches above, quiz branch and Advance section below) untouched.

wired_observations.name: thermal_expansion_observed
wired_observations.driver: src/renderer/game/scenes/ThermalRigScene.js:325 (getCompletionObservation() => 'thermal_expansion_observed'). Note: ThermalRigScene IS registered (config.js:21,52; sceneRegistry.js:99) — so this observation has a working emission path despite the bug log calling it 'LabRig (config not present)'. Bug log may have been written before ThermalRigScene shipped, or before its config registration landed.

wired_observations.audit_method: for each of the 21 names, grep src/renderer/game/ for the literal string and inspect each match for whether it pushes to state.observations vs reads from it. Cross-checked against the only two emission code paths in the codebase: constructionSystem.js:530 (driven by blueprint.completion.observation) and LabRigBase.js:559 (driven by subclass getCompletionObservation()). Only 3 distinct observation strings flow through these paths today: bridge_built (bridgeBlueprint), load_test_completed (MaterialLabScene), thermal_expansion_observed (ThermalRigScene).
wired_observations.discrepancy_with_bug_log: Bug log .claude/bugs/2026-04-27-quest-engine-and-traversal.md (lines 36-67) reports 2 wired / 19 unwired and lists thermal_expansion_observed under unwired with note 'LabRig (config not present)'. Static audit today shows ThermalRigScene IS registered in config.js and sceneRegistry.js, and its getCompletionObservation() returns 'thermal_expansion_observed'. So the actual count is 3 wired / 18 unwired. This does not change Path D semantics — 18 quests will still visibly block at observe step until per-quest wiring lands per observation-wiring-plan.md. The wiring-plan should be updated to reflect heat_failure being already-wired (recommend the orchestrator surface this to the per-quest design pass session).

section_8_declaration.progression_primitives_updated: state.observations is READ-only consulted via .includes(); the gate does not write to state.observations or any other progression primitive
section_8_declaration.act_1_to_3_scaling_strategy: act-agnostic — observe-step gate applies uniformly to all observe steps in all quests across all acts. NO act-specific branches per Section 8.2 (verified — no `if (act === N)` or equivalent introduced)

phase_2_audit.path_d_acknowledgment: Per Path D: this gate WILL visibly block the 18 unwired-observation quests at their first observe step. This is INTENTIONAL. Per-quest wiring is scheduled in observation-wiring-plan.md and will happen in separate per-quest sessions, NOT in this dispatch. (Note: heat_failure / thermal_expansion_observed should be reclassified as already-wired in that plan; see discrepancy_with_bug_log above.)
phase_2_audit.user_runtime_protocol: Tonight's playbook Task 3 Phases 3-7. Most critical checks: (1) Resume save with bridge_collapse already in completedQuests — must remain completed (no retroactive uncomplete). (2) Use tools/inspect-save.js to remove bridge_collapse from completedQuests; replay quest. After Mr. Chen's 'go build the bridge' dialog, the quest must NOT auto-complete on subsequent dialog dismissal. It must wait for actual `bridge_built` observation from completeBuild(). (3) Confirm state.observations contains 'bridge_built' after building, quest advances exactly then. (4) For one of the 18 unwired quests (e.g. food_chain_tracker), confirm it now sits at its observe step instead of auto-completing. Optional bonus: try heat_failure (thermal expansion) end-to-end since per static audit it appears to have a working emission path through ThermalRigScene/LabRigBase — confirms the wired list is actually 3, not 2. Paste runtime evidence back to mark this dispatch runtime-validated.
phase_2_audit.notes: REQUIRES RUNTIME VALIDATION TONIGHT — engine-level change with broad blast radius. Static-only PASS until tonight's bridge_collapse replay confirms (a) wired quests still complete via real observation emit, (b) unwired quests now visibly hang at observe step (Path D intent), (c) no retroactive uncompletes. Per arc.md v1.3 hardened rule: a static-only PASS on a critical path is yellow, not green. One audit finding to surface to wiring-plan author: thermal_expansion_observed appears wired (ThermalRigScene + LabRigBase) — if confirmed at runtime, the unwired list shrinks from 19 to 18 quests.
